surface_request: 我想做一个工具，帮普通人把模糊想法拆成 AI 能执行的任务。
real_goal: Create a practical thinking aid that turns vague intent into clear, bounded, executable AI task contracts.
domain_direction: General-purpose task clarification and execution-contract generation.
key_variables: Target users have ideas but lack task decomposition vocabulary
The output must be understandable by both humans and AI agents
The first version should prove the clarity workflow, not build a full platform
missing_critical_info: Primary output format for the first prototype
Whether the tool is interactive, document-based, or prompt-based
unnecessary_complexity: Multi-agent orchestration before the contract format is proven
User accounts, cloud sync, or marketplace features
Automatic execution before users trust the generated contract
positive_outcomes: Users can see their real goal, constraints, and next step
AI execution receives a bounded contract instead of a vague request
The prototype can be tested with several neutral user scenarios
negative_risks: The tool may over-question users instead of helping them move forward
The tool may create rigid templates that ignore user context
Execution may start before risk boundaries are clear

minimum_prototype.description: A one-page contract generator showing real goal, boundaries, allowed actions, forbidden actions, validation points, and risks.

minimum_action: Draft the contract structure and run it against three sample vague requests.
assumptions: A document-style prototype is enough to validate direction
No external integrations are required for the first test
Master should directly produce the first prototype without creating Agents

execution_contract.real_goal: Help non-expert users convert vague ideas into executable AI task contracts.
task_boundaries: Do not build a production app
allowed_actions: List validation points and risk boundaries
forbidden_actions: Do not create Agents by default
Do not add accounts, automation, or publishing features
Do not send raw vague requests to execution
execution_contract.minimum_prototype: One-page execution contract draft with three example conversions.
validation_metrics: A user can identify whether the real goal is correct
The next action is clear without additional broad questioning
Risks and forbidden actions are visible
risk_boundaries: Pause if the requested domain requires specialized legal, medical, or financial judgment
Pause if the first prototype reveals the real goal is wrong

validation_points: The generated contract is easier to execute than the original request
The prototype can be reviewed in one pass
risk_boundaries: Do not claim the contract is complete when critical variables are unknown
Do not add workflow complexity before the clarity mechanism is validated
